sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 36

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 36:1
items.html:
(to the question) The lower Hey of HaVaYaH
While the Nukva of ZA is with him back-to-back [Achor be Achor], and they cleave in a single wall, she is called by the name "the lower Hey of HaVaYaH," for she cleaves to the Vav of HaVaYaH in his name. Afterwards, at the time of Gadlut [greatness], after she has been sawn off from him and become a separate Partzuf in her own right, she is called by a special name of her own, namely ADNI or Elokim. (p. 769, Item 53)
